codex.mcpLoginGuidance: Run in PowerShell: codex mcp login {serverName}
codex.restartGuidance: Restart or reload the Codex session when new MCP servers are not visible after Apply.
codex.notes: Primary target for this kit. User-scope config is the default; project-scope config is available when installScope is project.

claudeCode.mcpLoginGuidance: Run in PowerShell: claude mcp login {serverName}
claudeCode.restartGuidance: Restart Claude Code or reload MCP servers after project .mcp.json changes.
claudeCode.notes: The kit writes project .mcp.json. Claude Code supports remote HTTP OAuth through claude mcp login or the interactive /mcp panel.

geminiCli.restartGuidance: Restart the Gemini CLI session when newly generated MCP servers are not visible.
geminiCli.notes: The kit writes settings.json-style MCP config with Gemini's streamable-HTTP httpUrl field; local stdio entries keep the standard command and args fields. Gemini CLI supports automatic OAuth discovery and interactive /mcp auth.
